title: Baseline integration scenario skeleton
description: Template scenario for deterministic end-to-end integration validation. This file is not canonical policy truth and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish a policy-aligned context payload through the registry-aligned MQTT input plane used by the operational system.
Subscribe to the verification-safe audit stream and capture the routing outcome.

notes: Thresholds, trigger predicates, and action-domain assumptions must be derived from frozen assets rather than hardcoded here.
Clone this file to create deterministic Class 0, Class 1, Class 2, stale, missing-state, or conflict scenarios.
Class 1 autonomous execution must remain limited to the frozen low-risk lighting catalog; doorlock-sensitive behavior must not be represented as Class 1 execution.
Schema-governed context fixtures referenced by this scenario should include environmental_context.doorbell_detected.
